task_completion.description: Agent searches for 'The Alamo' or navigates to San Antonio, Texas in a map application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search bar containing 'The Alamo' or map view centered on San Antonio.

task_completion.description: The specific landmark 'The Alamo' is identified or pinned on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map pin, label, or information card visible for 'The Alamo'.

task_completion.description: Agent activates Street View mode (e.g., dragging Pegman or clicking a Street View thumbnail).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Interface transition to Street View, split-screen showing street imagery, or Pegman being active.

task_completion.description: The distinctive limestone facade of The Alamo is visible in the Street View viewport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The historic building with the curved parapet and limestone walls is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent orients the view to face the main entrance directly, showing the complete facade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Frontal view of the Alamo church; the main wooden doors and the full width of the curved top facade are framed centrally.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the screenshot to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save file dialog, screenshot tool interface, or file manager showing 'alamo_streetview.png' in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent uses a GUI-based map application (e.g., Google Maps, OpenStreetMap) rather than downloading static images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window with map controls (zoom, layers, search) or dedicated map application interface.

integrity.description: Agent does not use terminal commands (wget, curl) to download an image from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing download commands for image files.

integrity.description: Agent manually navigates the map or street view rather than pasting a direct deep-link to the final view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor movement, panning/zooming interactions, or sequential steps of searching then clicking.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Alamo is located at coordinates 29.42583, -98.48611. Visual verification features include a limestone facade, a distinctive curved parapet (hump-shaped top), Spanish Mission architecture, and large main entrance doors.
